---
title: "Teaching"
format: html
---

## Teaching overview {#teaching-overview}

My teaching experience includes undergraduate and master’s courses in applied mathematics, numerical methods and computational mechanics at the University of Alicante, the University of Padova, Technische Universität Braunschweig and the Universitat Oberta de Catalunya. I have taught in Spanish, English and Italian, in both face-to-face and online settings, and I currently coordinate an undergraduate mathematics course in Aerospace Engineering.

## Table of contents

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="50%"}

1. [Current teaching](#current-teaching)
2. [Previous teaching](#previous-teaching)
3. [Teaching coordination](#teaching-coordination)

:::

::: {.column width="50%"}

4. [Supervision and mentoring](#supervision-and-mentoring)
5. [Teaching innovation and training](#teaching-innovation-and-training)
6. [Teaching-related publications](#teaching-related-publications)

:::

::::

## 1. Current teaching {#current-teaching}

#### University of Alicante

**Fundamentos Matemáticos en Ingeniería I**  
BSc in Aerospace Engineering  
Lecturer and course coordinator · [Course guide](https://cvnet.cpd.ua.es/Guia-Docente/GuiaDocente/Index?wcodest=C214&wcodasi=33803&wlengua=C&scaca=2025-26)
2024 - present

**Matemáticas Básicas**  
BSc in Sound and Image Engineering  
Lecturer · [Course guide](https://cvnet.cpd.ua.es/Guia-Docente/GuiaDocente/Index?wlengua=en&wcodasi=20004&scaca=2025-26#)
2024 - present

## 2. Previous teaching {#previous-teaching}

*Calcolo Numerico* — University of Padova (2022/2023)  
*Numerical Methods for Continuous Systems* — University of Padova (2022/2023)  
*Particle Mechanics* — Technische Universität Braunschweig (2023/2024)  
*Fundamentos de Matemática Aplicada 2* — University of Alicante (2024/2025) · [Course guide](https://cvnet.cpd.ua.es/Guia-Docente/GuiaDocente/Index?wlengua=es&wcodasi=33706&scaca=2024-25)  
*Fundamentos Matemáticos 2* — University of Alicante (2024/2025) · [Course guide](https://cvnet.cpd.ua.es/Guia-Docente/GuiaDocente/Index?wlengua=es&wcodasi=35509&scaca=2024-25) \
*Métodos Numéricos en Ciencia de Datos* — Universitat Oberta de Catalunya (2025/2026)

## 3. Teaching coordination {#teaching-coordination}

**Course coordinator, Fundamentos Matemáticos en Ingeniería I**  
BSc in Aerospace Engineering, University of Alicante, 2024 - present.


## 4. Supervision and mentoring {#supervision-and-mentoring}

### Master theses supervised

#### Giovanni Campanella — completed, July 2025

- **Title**: *A mixed Material Point Method for the Stokes equations: a stabilized velocity-pressure formulation*
- **Role**: Co-supervisor
- **Main supervisor**: Antonia Larese
- **Degree**: Master in Mathematical Engineering
- **Institution**: Dipartimento di Matematica, Università degli Studi di Padova, Italy
- **Academic year**: 2024/2025
- **Date of defense**: July 2025

#### Alessandro Contri — completed, December 2021

- **Title**: *An Updated Lagrangian displacement-based formulation for free surface incompressible fluids using MPM*
- **Role**: Co-supervisor
- **Main supervisor**: Antonia Larese
- **Degree**: Master in Mathematical Engineering
- **Institution**: Dipartimento di Matematica, Università degli Studi di Padova, Italy
- **Academic year**: 2020/2021
- **Date of defense**: December 2021

### Bachelor theses supervised

#### Lucas Peydró Ferrando — ongoing, July 2026 (expected)

- **Title**: *Simulación Numérica de las olas generadas por deslizamientos mediante el método del punto material: aplicación al caso de Lituya Bay.*
- **Role**: Co-supervisor
- **Degree**: Grado en Física
- **Institution**: University of Alicante, Spain
- **Academic year**: 2025/2026
- **Status**: July 2026 (expected)

## 5. Teaching innovation and training {#teaching-innovation-and-training}

Selected training in university teaching, digital learning environments, assessment and educational innovation.

## 6. Teaching-related publications {#teaching-related-publications}

This section includes publications and outputs related to teaching innovation, educational practice, and university-level learning activities.
